chunks.title: Reign of Zedekiah
chunks.reason: Introduces King Zedekiah's background and his rebellion against Babylon.

chunks.title: Siege and Capture of Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Describes the siege, the breach of the city walls, and the capture of Zedekiah.

chunks.title: Destruction of Jerusalem and Exile
chunks.reason: Details the burning of the temple, removal of vessels, and execution of leaders.

chunks.title: Exile Statistics
chunks.reason: Provides a numerical record of the people taken into exile in different years.

chunks.title: Release of Jehoiachin
chunks.reason: Narrates the elevation of King Jehoiachin from prison by Evil-merodach.
